sections.paragraph:
Original: תּבוּאה

Transliteration: tebû'âh

Phonetic: teb-oo-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. produce, product, revenue
    1. product, yield, crops (of the earth usually)
    2. income, revenue
    3. gain (of wisdom) (figuratively)
    4. product of lips (figuratively)

Origin: from H935

TWOT entry: 212c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
